get.description: Retrieve all speakers with filter. This API supports pagination.

parameters.name: sort

Display Name Asc | Gender Desc.summary: Ascending order in displayName, then descending order in gender

parameters.description: Sort by given order. Available fields are displayName, locale, gender, speakerType, and ageRange. Example: "displayName:1" (NO whitespace)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of speakers in each page.

totalCount.description: Total item count available for pagniation

count.description: Item count for the current page

data.description: A list of items for the current page

speakerStyles.description: Available speaker styles for this speaker

deprecated.description: Whether this speaker is deprecated or not. Deprecated speaker styles should not be used in TTS API.

sampleTtsUrl.description: Sample tts url to test/hear the voice of the speaker

post.description: Has a timeout of 90 seconds. If the process is not completed within that time, it will return a pending TTS Job just like the [Async TTS](async-tts).

text.description: Text to be converted to audio

speaker.description: Speaker ID. You can retrieve speaker ID with [Retrieve Speakers](retrieve-speakers) `/api/v1/speakers` API.

speakerStyle.description: Speaker style id for the chosen speaker. You can retrieve speaker styles with /api/v1/speakers API. Only some of our speakers have multiple speaker styles.

speed.description: Speed of the audio to be generated

201.description: It will return generated audio urls if job is successfully completed within 90 seconds. Otherwise it will return an incomplete TTS Job just like the [Async TTS](async-tts). Check the job status with [Async Retrieve Job](async-retrieve-job) API using the returned id.

id.description: Id of the job returned. This id will be later used to check the progress of the TTS job.

type.description: Type of the current job. Currently only TTS is supported.

urls.description: Audio URLs of the TTS request

pronunciations.description: Pronunciations applied to the TTS request

post.description:
Returns a TTS job. Check the job status with [Async Retrieve Job](async-retrieve-job) `/api/v1/tts/{jobId}` API using the returned id.

Use callbackUrls get a callback when a TTS job completed.

text.description: Text to be converted to audio

speaker.description: Speaker ID. You can retrieve speaker ID with [Retrieve Speakers](retrieve-speakers) `/api/v1/speakers` API.

speakerStyle.description: Speaker style id for the chosen speaker. You can retrieve speaker styles with /api/v1/speakers API. Only some of our speakers have multiple speaker styles.

speed.description: Speed of the audio to be generated

callbackUrls.description:
Callback urls for any async job. Max size of callback urls is 4.

The callback will be sent only once. It will be a POST request with the same data format as Async Retrieve Job `/api/v1/tts/{jobId}` API.
Your endpoints should return 2xx status code and should not take more than 10 seconds to respond. Otherwise, the callback will be considered as failed.

201.description: Job entity that can be later used to fetch the status of the TTS job.

id.description: Id of the job returned. This id will be later used to check the progress of the TTS job.

type.description: Type of the current job. Currently only TTS is supported.

callbackUrls.description: Callback urls for any async job. This can be empty array.

get.description: Retrieve job result. It will return generated audio urls if job is successfully completed.

id.description: Id of the job returned. This id will be later used to check the progress of the TTS job.

type.description: Type of the current job. Currently only TTS is supported.

callbackUrls.description: Callback urls for any async job. This can be empty array.

urls.description: Audio URLs of the TTS request

pronunciations.description: Pronunciations applied to the TTS request

info.title: Genny API
info.description:
This is the documentation for Genny TTS API.

Use X-API-KEY header to make API requests with the API key generated at https://genny.lovo.ai.
Click Authorize button on the top right corner and enter your API key in the value input field. Click Authorize button to save your authentication method.

TTS credits will be deducted from the account associated with the API key used.

TTS result audio URLs are valid for 24 hours and will expire afterwords. You can use the URL to download the result audio for further use.
